message:
feat(protocol): re-export ToolAnnotations from fastmcp-protocol

Add ToolAnnotations to the public re-export list so consumers can
annotate tools with metadata (e.g., readOnlyHint, destructiveHint)
without reaching into the protocol crate directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
